In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [2]:
df = pd.read_csv("auto-mpg.csv").replace("?", np.nan)
In [3]:
df["horsepower"] = pd.to_numeric(df["horsepower"], errors="coerce")
In [5]:
missing = df.isna().sum()
missing_pct = (missing / len(df) * 100).round(2)
In [6]:
print(pd.DataFrame({"missing": missing, "missing_%": missing_pct}).sort_values("missing", ascending=False))

              missing  missing_%
horsepower          6       1.51
mpg                 0       0.00
cylinders           0       0.00
displacement        0       0.00
weight              0       0.00
acceleration        0       0.00
model year          0       0.00
origin              0       0.00
car name            0       0.00
In [7]:
num = df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number])
In [8]:
sk = num.skew(numeric_only=True)
ku = num.kurtosis(numeric_only=True)
print(pd.DataFrame({"skewness": sk, "kurtosis": ku}).sort_values("skewness", ascending=False))

              skewness  kurtosis
horsepower    1.087326  0.696947
origin        0.923776 -0.817597
displacement  0.719645 -0.746597
weight        0.531063 -0.785529
cylinders     0.526922 -1.376662
mpg           0.457066 -0.510781
acceleration  0.278777  0.419497
model year    0.011535 -1.181232
In [9]:
corr = num.corr()
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
plt.imshow(corr, aspect="auto")
plt.xticks(range(len(corr.columns)), corr.columns, rotation=90)
plt.yticks(range(len(corr.columns)), corr.columns)
plt.colorbar()
plt.title("Auto-mpg correlation heatmap")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [10]:
pairs = [("weight", "mpg"), ("horsepower", "mpg"), ("displacement", "mpg")]
for x, y in pairs:
    plt.figure()
    plt.scatter(df[x], df[y])
    plt.xlabel(x); plt.ylabel(y)
    plt.title(f"{y} vs {x}")
    plt.show()
In [11]:
origin_map = {1: "America", 2: "Europe", 3: "Japan"}
print(origin_map)

{1: 'America', 2: 'Europe', 3: 'Japan'}
In [ ]:
